_comment: Weights/limits for the per-frame animation IK solve (render-only; hot-reloaded on desktop). Empirical — tweak by feel. See Plans/ANIMATION_SOLVER_PLAN.md 11.4. UNITS: all residuals are dimensionless (px rows divided by the rig reach ~21.6px), so these numbers compare honestly across pixel and radian rows; the spread IS the priority. Tiers: HARD (pins/no-pen) >> CONTACT >> aim/priors. Pose priors are per-region: stiff torso, loose limbs.
